subject: Math
title: Graphs & Data
description: Mean, median, mode, range, and reading graphs.

questions.q: A student scored 82, 90, 76, and 92 on four tests. Mean score?
A bar graph shows: Mon=12, Tue=8, Wed=15, Thu=10, Fri=5. Which day had most?
Five friends have 3, 5, 7, 9, and 6 books. Mean number of books?
A set has mode 8 and median 8. What might the set be?
questions.explanation: 6,8,8,10: mode=8 (appears twice), median=(8+8)/2=8. Both conditions met.

questions.q: In a class of 5 students, scores are 70, 85, 90, 95, and 100. What score would bring the mean to exactly 90?
Which measure of centre is MOST affected by an outlier (very extreme value)?
questions.explanation: The mean uses all values in its calculation, so one extreme value can shift it significantly.
